activities.title: Arrival & National Mall Exploration
activities.description: After hotel check-in, walk to the National Mall. Visit the Lincoln Memorial and explore the Reflecting Pool area. Walk past the Washington Monument and enjoy sunset views.
activities.notes: Free admission. Comfortable walking shoes recommended.

activities.title: Dinner at Founding Farmers
activities.description: Farm-to-table American cuisine near the White House

activities.title: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History
activities.description: Explore the Hope Diamond, dinosaur fossils, Ocean Hall, and human origins exhibits. One of the world's most visited natural history museums.
activities.notes: Free admission. Arrive early to avoid crowds.

activities.title: National Gallery of Art
activities.description: Explore both the West Building (classical art) and East Building (modern art). See works by da Vinci, Monet, Vermeer, and Rothko.
activities.location: Constitution Ave NW, between 3rd and 9th Streets
activities.notes: Free admission. Don't miss the underground passage between buildings.

activities.title: Dinner at Rasika
activities.description: Modern Indian cuisine in Penn Quarter

activities.title: United States Capitol Tour
activities.description: Guided tour of the U.S. Capitol building including the Rotunda, National Statuary Hall, and Crypt.
activities.notes: Free but requires advance reservation through your representative's office

activities.title: Library of Congress
activities.description: Visit the stunning Thomas Jefferson Building and view rare books and exhibitions

activities.title: Lunch at Eastern Market
activities.description: Historic public market with diverse food vendors

activities.title: National Air and Space Museum
activities.description: Explore aviation and space exploration history

activities.title: Kennedy Center Evening Performance
activities.description: Attend a performance at the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts. Options include theater, ballet, symphony, or opera.
activities.notes: Ticket price varies by show. This is an estimated mid-range ticket. Free rooftop terrace with city views.

activities.title: National Museum of American History
activities.description: See the Star-Spangled Banner, First Ladies' gowns, and American cultural artifacts

activities.title: Lunch at Old Ebbitt Grill
activities.description: Historic restaurant near the White House, established 1856

activities.title: White House Visitor Center & Lafayette Square
activities.description: Visit the White House Visitor Center and walk around Lafayette Square
activities.notes: Free. Actual White House tours require advance application.

activities.title: Georgetown Exploration
activities.description: Stroll through historic Georgetown, browse shops on M Street, and walk along the waterfront
activities.notes: Budget for coffee/snack. Take metro or rideshare.

activities.title: Check-out & Departure
activities.description: Hotel check-out and travel to DCA for 6:15 PM flight

input.reasoning: This itinerary successfully meets all requirements within the $1,500 budget. The total cost is $1,476, leaving $24 buffer. Breakdown: Flights $380 (round-trip Chicago-DC on United), Hotel $660 (4 nights at 3-star Capitol Hill Hotel, 0.8 miles from National Mall), Meals $176, Kennedy Center show $85, Transportation $15, Activities $160 (most Smithsonian museums and monuments are free). All must-visit locations are included: Smithsonian Natural History Museum (Day 2), Lincoln Memorial (Day 1), National Gallery of Art (Day 2), and Kennedy Center evening show (Day 3). The hotel is 3-star rated and within walking distance of the National Mall. The itinerary balances cultural attractions with dining experiences and provides a comprehensive DC experience over 4 full days (arriving Oct 10, departing Oct 14).
input.final_message_to_user:
I've created a comprehensive 4-day cultural itinerary for Washington DC that fits within your $1,500 budget at $1,476 total. 

**Highlights:**
✈️ **Flights:** Round-trip United Airlines from Chicago (ORD) to Reagan National (DCA) - $380
🏨 **Hotel:** Capitol Hill Hotel (3-star, 0.8 miles from National Mall) - $660 for 4 nights
🎭 **All requested attractions included:** Smithsonian Natural History Museum, Lincoln Memorial, National Gallery of Art, and an evening performance at Kennedy Center

**What makes this trip special:**
- Most major attractions are FREE (Smithsonian museums, monuments, memorials)
- Strategic hotel location allows walking to most sites
- Balanced mix of museums, monuments, performing arts, and local dining
- Includes bonus attractions: Capitol tour, Library of Congress, Air & Space Museum, Georgetown

**Daily Overview:**
- **Day 1:** Arrival, Lincoln Memorial & National Mall sunset
- **Day 2:** Natural History Museum & National Gallery of Art
- **Day 3:** Capitol, Library of Congress, Kennedy Center show
- **Day 4:** American History Museum, Georgetown, departure prep

You'll experience the best of DC's cultural offerings while staying comfortably under budget!
